name: tuesdays-with-morrie
description: Mitch Albom's Tuesdays With Morrie — life wisdom toolkit exploring Morrie Schwartz's 14 Tuesday lessons on love, work, family, aging, forgiveness, money, and dying with dignity while truly learning how to live
useCase: Understand what matters most in life, learn to accept death, forgive others, reject cultural lies, and love more fully
knownRisks: The book is a memoir, not a philosophy text — Morrie's teachings are anecdotal, not systematic
Some readers find the book sentimental or saccharine
Death acceptance is deeply personal — what worked for Morrie may not work for everyone
